name: Decimal to Binary Converter
description: Convert decimal numbers (base-10) to binary (base-2). Shows 8-bit, 16-bit representations.
explanation:
## Decimal to Binary

Divide by 2 repeatedly; remainders (read bottom-up) form the binary.

**Example:** 13 ÷ 2 = 6 R1 → 6 ÷ 2 = 3 R0 → 3 ÷ 2 = 1 R1 → 1 ÷ 2 = 0 R1 → **1101**

| Decimal | Binary |
|---------|--------|
| 0 | 0000 |
| 1 | 0001 |
| 8 | 1000 |
| 15 | 1111 |
| 255 | 11111111 |
